_description: Sliding camera bracket on 1in PVC: SliderRail + SliderCarriage with two-axis adjustment for overhead camera mounting (e.g., piano keyboard).

components.description: 1in PVC clamp with integral rail plate and 60mm travel slot
Carriage that mounts under SmallRig cage and rides the rail's slot

notes: Phase 4 feature — assembly_steps are not yet executed by KitBuilder. v1 builds components individually; user assembles physically per docs/features/FEATURE_slider_camera_bracket.md.
